strings.name: Open Mapping Group McGill: A Member of the McGill Undergraduate Geography Society
strings.extendedDescription: The Open Mapping Group McGill: A Member of McGill Undergraduate Geography Society (OMG McGill) aims to connect students with open geospatial data and technologies to enhance resilience, community-building, and learning through mapping–on campus, in Montreal, in Canada, and abroad.
